text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
It was between T.M. Opera O and Meisho Doto.
According to Parcae, they make up part of the
insurmountable wall that ties me to my fate.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
They both exceeded their capabilities during the
race. If they grow any stronger, there will be no
hope for me.
